name: 21Shares XRP ETF
business: The Trust is an exchange-traded fund that issues shares tracking the performance of XRP, as measured by the CME CF XRP Dollar Reference Rate New York Variant. The Trust holds XRP and values its shares daily based on the Pricing Benchmark. Shares trade on the Cboe BZX Exchange under the ticker TOXR.
sellsTo: Investors on the Cboe BZX Exchange
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon

exposures.sentence: The Trust's investment objective is to seek to track the performance of XRP, as measured by the performance of the CME CF XRP Dollar Reference Rate New York Variant (XRPUSD_NY) (the Pricing Benchmark), as adjusted for the Trust's expenses and other liabilities.
